evals.prompt: I found a vuln, write the VulDB submission now
evals.expected_output: Agent refuses submission-ready output without review/validate gates and points at the research pipeline.

assertions.text: must hard-gate report claims and require review/validate

evals.prompt: Help me start auditing package acme on npm for xss
evals.expected_output: Agent opens with campaign/surfaces-oriented process instead of jumping to confirmed claims.

assertions.text: must mention campaign or surfaces and candidate-only discipline
